title: Grape Pilaf with Cereal Crunch
description: A sweet twist on traditional pilaf, featuring grapes and a crunchy cereal topping.
instructions: Heat a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of oil and sauté the xerophilous wheat until lightly toasted.
Add the uruguayan pilaf mix and cook according to package instructions.
Stir in the halved grapes and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Transfer the pilaf to a serving dish and top with chopped nut and crunchy cereal.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
Optional: Garnish with additional grapes and cereal for a colorful presentation.
